title: Third Person Nametags
description: Shows a player their own nametag in F5.
body:
![Screenshot of a player and their nametag in F5.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c3d9d3f120613ea85c7ac58e64607d3260e9cdd.png)

**Third Person Nametags** is a simple mod for Fabric that makes your own nametag visible.

Once installed, your nametag will appear above your character exactly how other players see it.

### Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

Fabric API must be installed for the mod to work.
